title: GuardrailRelativeType
content:
# GuardrailRelativeType

Limiting rate of change value is an absolute value or a percentage of the current value before the control change.

## Enum Values

- `value`
- `percentage`
summary: Limiting rate of change value is an absolute value or a percentage of the current value before the control change.

schema.description: Limiting rate of change value is an absolute value or a percentage of the current value before the control change.
